fields.title: Add orchestrator role awareness for main agent
fields.description:
The main (orchestrator) agent receives NO explicit indication that it is the orchestrator. Subagents get WORKER_DELEGATION_PROMPT and subagent=true, but the main agent only sees subagent=false with no interpretation. This causes: the main agent doesn't know it must handle git operations, can't reason about its orchestrator role, and might instruct subagents to do git ops (which fail).

Fix:
1. Extend <permissions instructions> in sandbox/index.ts (~line 1096) to add a subagent=false case describing orchestrator responsibilities.
2. Consider creating an ORCHESTRATOR_DELEGATION_PROMPT analogous to WORKER_DELEGATION_PROMPT in agent/worker.ts.
3. Clean up redundancy between WORKER_DELEGATION_PROMPT and <permissions instructions> -- consolidate git-blocking rules.

Key files:
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/index.ts (lines 1058-1110, permissions instructions block)
- extensions/tau/src/agent/worker.ts (line 58, WORKER_DELEGATION_PROMPT)
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/sandbox-change.ts (buildSandboxStateNoticeText)

Run npm run gate in extensions/tau/ when done.
fields.notes: Implemented orchestrator role awareness in sandbox permissions prompt and reduced worker prompt git-policy duplication. Ran npm run gate in extensions/tau: typecheck/lint passed (warnings only), tests failed in test/prompt-modes-session-start.test.ts (3 failures, appears unrelated to this change). Filed follow-up issue tau-b4t.
fields.close_reason: Implemented orchestrator role awareness in sandbox permissions block
